attributes.description: KPIs and trends for monitoring backup ACLs on OVH dedicated servers. Designed for SREs: rule coverage, enabled protocols, application status, and anomalies.

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Total Backup ACL Entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Total Backup ACL Entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied == true
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied == true
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied == false
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied == false
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Distinct IP Blocks` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ip_block)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Distinct IP Blocks` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ip_block)

columns.label: Count of ACL entries with errors

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of ACL entries` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Number of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Is Applied` = ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Number of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Is Applied` = ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied
| SORT `Time Bucket`

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Count of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Event Type` = event.type
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Count of Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Event Type` = event.type
| SORT `Time Bucket`

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `FTP Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true, `NFS Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, `CIFS Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `FTP Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true, `NFS Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, `CIFS Enabled` = COUNT(*) WHERE ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true

attributes.title: Backup ACL Protocol Enablement Count (FTP, NFS, CIFS)

embeddableConfig.title: Backup ACL Protocol Enablement Count (FTP, NFS, CIFS)

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| EVAL `Protocol Combination` = CASE(
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "FTP + NFS + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, "FTP + NFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "FTP + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "NFS + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true, "FTP",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, "NFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "CIFS",
    "None"
  )
| STATS `ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Protocol Combination`
| SORT `ACL Entries` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| EVAL `Protocol Combination` = CASE(
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "FTP + NFS + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, "FTP + NFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "FTP + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true AND ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "NFS + CIFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp == true, "FTP",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs == true, "NFS",
    ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs == true, "CIFS",
    "None"
  )
| STATS `ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Protocol Combination`
| SORT `ACL Entries` DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Distribution of ACL Entries by Protocol Combination

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Is Applied` = ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Is Applied` = ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied

embeddableConfig.title: ACL Entries: Applied vs Not Applied

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Backup ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Backup ACL Entries` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| STATS `Backup ACL Entries` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name
| SORT `Backup ACL Entries` DESC
| LIMIT 15

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| KEEP ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ip_block, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl-default
| KEEP ovh_dedicated_servers.server_name, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ip_block, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.is_applied, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.ftp, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.nfs, ovh_dedicated_servers.backup_acl.cifs, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100
